account_id.description: The unique identifier of the account. You find this information on [the Yuno dashboard](https://dashboard.y.uno/) (UUID, 36 chars.).

merchant_reference.description: The unique identifier of the merchant's payout (MAX 255; MIN 3).

description.description: The description of the payout (MAX 255; MIN 3).

country.description: Country where the transaction must be processed (MAX 2; MIN 2; [ISO 3166-1](country-reference)).

purpose.description: Indicates the purpose for the payout. Possible enum values: Check the Purpose list.

amount.description: Specifies the payout amount object, with the value and currency.

currency.description: The currency used to make the payout. For a full list of currency codes, see [Country reference](/docs/country-reference) (MAX 3; MIN 3; ISO 4217).

beneficiary.description: Specifies the beneficiary object with their identification.

merchant_beneficiary_id.description: Unique identifier of the recipient defined by the merchant (MAX 255; MIN 1).

national_entity.description: Beneficiary's national entity type. Individual by default

legal_name.description: Beneficiary's name (MAX 80). Only necessary when national entity is ENTITY.

date_of_birth.description: The beneficiary's date of birth in the YYYY-MM-DD format (MAX 10; MIN 10).

country_code.description: The country calling code of the phone (MAX 3; MIN 1).  Check the [Country reference](country-reference) to see the phone codes.

number.description: The phone number, without the country code (MAX 32; MIN 1).

city.description: The city considered for the address (MAX 255; MIN 3).

state.description: The state/province from the address (MAX 255; MIN 3).

zip_code.description: The zipcode for the address (MAX 11; MIN 4).

withdrawal_method.description: The withdrawal method to make the payout.

provider_id.description: The provider to process the payouts with

vaulted_token.description: The vaulted token for a previously stored payment_method. If a payment is created using a vaulted_token (MAX: 64; MIN: 36).

original_transaction_id.description: Id of the referenced payment transaction. Only for payouts to CARD. (MAX 64; MIN 36)

original_payment_id.description: The id of the referenced payment (UUID; 36 chars.).

on_hold.description: Defines if the merchant wants to hold the payout and sets it to be processed later using the Release payout endpoint.

detail.description: Withdrawal method details. Only the object corresponding to the withdrawal method type is necessary.

bank_transfer.description: Bank transfer details to make the payout.

code.description: The beneficiary's specific financial institution code (MAX 8).

branch.description: The beneficiary's specific financial institution branch (MAX 8).

branch_digit.description: The beneficiary's specific financial institution branch digit (MAX 2).

account.description: Beneficiary's financial institution account number or financial institution account alias, such as Clabe for MX (MAX 255; MIN 3).

number.description: Beneficiary's bank account number or bank account alias, such as Clabe for MX (MAX 250; MIN 3)

city.description: The city considered for the address (MAX 255; MIN 3).

state.description: The state/province from the address (MAX 255; MIN 3).

zip_code.description: The zipcode for the address (MAX 11; MIN 4).

wallet.description: Wallet details to make the withdrawal.

code.description: Beneficiary's wallet account identification code (MAX 3; MIN 250)

document.description: Wallet's owner national document associated to the withdrawal account.

phone.description: Wallet's owner phone associated to the withdrawal account.

country_code.description: The country calling code of the phone (MAX 3; MIN 1).  Check the [Country reference](country-reference) to see the phone codes.

number.description: The phone number, without the country code (MAX 32; MIN 1).

metadata.description: Specifies a list of metadata objects. You can add up to 50 metadata objects.

provider_data.status_detail: Errors. amount :: must be greater than 0
Batch Status: PENDING, Item Status: PENDING

status_detail.example: Errors. amount :: must be greater than 0
Batch Status: PENDING, Item Status: PENDING
